mnemonics: MAP IT: Metadata Acts as the 'Passport' for Information, Telling you its source, meaning, and journey.
keyPoints: Metadata is 'data about data', describing the structure, source, and usage of data within the warehouse.
It is essential for data governance, ETL processes, and enabling end-users to find and understand available data.
The three main types are Technical Metadata (ETL details), Business Metadata (definitions/glossary), and Operational Metadata (execution logs).
commonMistakes: Neglecting metadata management, leading to an ungoverned 'data swamp' instead of a warehouse.
Treating metadata as a one-time setup task rather than an ongoing process that needs maintenance and updates.
